act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: Lay-by sales.—(1) Where a supply of goods is made under a lay-by
content:
41. Lay-by sales.—(1) Where a supply of goods is made under a lay-by
agreement‚—
(a) the output tax on such supply shall become payable when payments
for such supply are made and, in each tax period, taxes shall be
assessed and paid at the time of payment of the price; and
(b) the amount of assessed output tax in each tax period shall be the tax-
fraction of the payments made in that period.
(2) Where a supply of any good is made under a lay-by agreement‚ separate
tax invoices shall be required to be issued against payment of each
instalment.

sub_sections.text:
Where a supply of goods is made under a lay-by
agreement‚—

the output tax on such supply shall become payable when payments
for such supply are made and, in each tax period, taxes shall be
assessed and paid at the time of payment of the price; and

the amount of assessed output tax in each tax period shall be the tax-
fraction of the payments made in that period.

Where a supply of any good is made under a lay-by agreement‚ separate
tax invoices shall be required to be issued against payment of each
instalment.
